examples: The insurance industry will pay out billions of dollars for damage caused by Hurricane Katrina.
They have got the walls to where they were before Katrina, more or less.
They could not smell the putrid mud that covered the ninth ward of New Orleans after Hurricane Katrina passed.
Many experts say mental health services in the region have not recovered since Hurricane Katrina.
My wife, three kids and I first evacuated Saturday morning when Katrina was just a Category 3.
